name: Apple Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream butter and sugar, beating until light.
3. Beat in eggs, one at a time.
4. Stir in apples, cheese, and nuts.
5. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
6. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the apple mixture.
7. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour.
9. Cool for 10 minutes before serving.
